reviewsSample.text: Needs more signs to lead to where you need to go in order to finish your paperwork.

Passports and Civil Status

The service provided at the passport office was excellent, with respect and professionalism. The passport processing time was approximately one hour and five minutes from the moment I entered the office until I received it. My number was 44, and I received it without any connections. However, at the civil status office, for a copy of a registration document or a response to a government letter, it took approximately two hours (because we are lawyers, the work was expedited in some departments). There was no justification for this delay, especially at numbers 14 and 11. The workload is disproportionate to the number of employees needed to handle citizens' affairs. This matter should be reconsidered in the interest of the public good.
